Like, if I wake up and I’m just not in the right headspace for a walk or a breathing exercise, maybe I could give myself permission to do something different, like just sitting quietly for a few minutes or listening to music that calms me down. It might help to remind myself that it’s okay if I don’t stick to a strict routine all the time. I could also try to keep my reminders simple, so they don’t feel like another task on my to-do list. But then again, I worry that if I don’t have a solid plan, I might just end up doing nothing at all. It’s just... I want to find that balance between being structured and being gentle with myself, but it feels like a tricky line to walk. I don’t know, it’s just a lot to consider, and I want to make it work without feeling overwhelmed by it all.
